steps.title: Close the parenthetical
steps.content: The main sentence structure is so drastically that the once-revolutionary technology can be found in everyday items. The phrase about cores numbering in the dozens, hundreds, or thousands is parenthetical and must be closed before that continues the main clause.

steps.title: Reject misplaced punctuation
steps.content: Choice B traps that inside the parenthetical. Choice C turns the that clause into a fragment. Choice D uses a comma instead of the dash needed to close the parenthetical interruption. The answer is A.
